nasb.text: Ask rain from the Lord at the time of the spring rain— The Lord who makes the storm clouds; And He will give them showers of rain, vegetation in the field to each man.

esv.text: Ask rain from the Lord in the season of the spring rain, from the Lord  who makes the storm clouds, and he will give them showers of rain, to everyone the vegetation in the field.

cnv.text: 在春雨的季節，你們要向耶和華求雨。 耶和華閃發雷電， 給人降雨，使各人的田地生長蔬菜。

ccb.text: 要在春季向耶和华求雨。 祂创造雷雨， 为世人降下甘霖， 使田间长出青翠之物。
